nasb.text: His shoots will sprout, And his beauty will be like the olive tree And his fragrance like the cedars of Lebanon.

esv.text: his shoots shall spread out; his beauty shall be like the olive, and his fragrance like Lebanon.

cnv.text: 他的幼枝必伸展， 他的榮美要像橄欖樹， 他的香氣必如黎巴嫩的香柏樹。

ccb.text: 他要长出嫩枝， 他要像橄榄树一样荣美， 如黎巴嫩的香柏树一般芳香。
